name: NGHM 1 MT Pilot
description: Near-term pilot target of 1 million tonne per annum green hydrogen, testing domestic electrolyser manufacturing and early project delivery.

name: NGHM 5 MT by 2030
description: National Green Hydrogen Mission target of 5 million tonnes per annum by 2030.

name: NGHM 10 MT Ambitious
description: Ambitious stretch target of 10 million tonnes per annum by 2035, requiring accelerated electrolyser deployment and workforce scale-up.

name: 1 MT Pilot (Alkaline + Ammonia + RE)
description: Near-term 1 MT pilot with 100% alkaline electrolysis, 50% conversion to ammonia, and dedicated RE. Full value chain workforce estimate.

name: 5 MT by 2030 (Mixed)
description: 5 MT target with 60/40 alkaline/PEM split, 70% to ammonia, dedicated RE. Reflects India's planned technology diversification.

name: 10 MT Ambitious (Mixed)
description: Ambitious 10 MT target with 50/50 alkaline/PEM split, 70% to ammonia, and 3.0x RE overprovisioning for round-the-clock supply.

name: Adani Kutch Phase 1
description: Adani Kutch Phase 1 — 1.3 MT H2/year (~9 GW electrolyser) feeding 1 MTPA ammonia export plant. 100% alkaline, dedicated RE. Illustrative of announced project scale.
